title: Batch Execution Basics
description: Submit a simple job and map the JCL -> JES -> program execution chain.

steps.title: JCL Review
steps.expected: Identify the job, step, and datasets referenced.
steps.hint: Look for JOB, EXEC, and DD statements.

steps.title: Submit Job
steps.screen:
Job DEMOJOB submitted.
JES2 assigns JOB00012.
steps.expected: Explain why JES is the control plane for batch.
steps.hint: JES queues and schedules work before it runs on an initiator.

steps.title: SYSOUT
steps.screen: IEF142I DEMOJOB STEP1 - STEP WAS EXECUTED - COND CODE 0000
steps.expected: Interpret the return code and tie it back to execution.
